title: Modern Textures
description: Backports textures from modern Minecraft to 1.2.5 and older
body:
Backports textures from modern Minecraft to 1.2.5 and older.

The "No Mojang" version doesn't replace the Mojang startup logo. The size of the modern image causes <b1.8 to crash, but it doesn't show up even if downscaled.

## What I haven't done
+ Compass — Impossible without mods
+ Clock — Impossible without mods
+ Water — Impossible without mods
+ Lava — Impossible without mods
+ Villagers — Quite hard, and can't be done fully without mods (contributions welcome for what *is* possible, though)
+ Panorama — I don't want to tie this pack to a specific version of modern Minecraft
+ Minecraft logo — Let's be real, most people probably don't want the new one
